KJV Isaiah Stylometry Ensemble Framework

End-to-end data creation, caching, feature extraction, distances, nearest-neighbor voting

# Install once if needed:
# install.packages(c("dplyr", "stringr", "readr", "tibble", "tidyr", "purrr", "ggplot2", "quanteda", "proxy", "udpipe", "scriptuRs"))

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(quanteda)
library(proxy)
library(udpipe)
library(scriptuRs)

set.seed(1234)

DATA_DIR <- "data"
CACHE_DIR <- "cache"
RESULTS_DIR <- "results"

for(d in c(DATA_DIR, CACHE_DIR, RESULTS_DIR)) {
  dir.create(d, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Future corpus plan:
# KJV = English King James Version, implemented here.
# WLC = Westminster Leningrad Codex / Masoretic Hebrew, planned.
# LXX = Septuagint Greek, planned.

corpus_registry <- tibble(
  corpus_id = c("KJV", "WLC", "LXX"),
  language = c("english", "hebrew", "greek"),
  implemented = c(TRUE, FALSE, FALSE),
  notes = c(
    "KJV from scriptuRs::kjv_bible(); implemented in this notebook.",
    "Planned: normalized CSV with book/chapter/verse/text columns.",
    "Planned: normalized CSV with book/chapter/verse/text columns."
  )
)

corpus_registry
cache_rds <- function(path, expr, rebuild = FALSE) {
  if(file.exists(path) && !rebuild) {
    readRDS(path)
  } else {
    obj <- eval(expr, envir = parent.frame())
    saveRDS(obj, path)
    obj
  }
}

safe_filename <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9_]+", "_") %>%
    str_replace_all("_+", "_") %>%
    str_remove("_$")
}

make_distance <- function(dfm_object, metric = "cosine") {
  X <- as.matrix(dfm_weight(dfm_object, scheme = "prop"))
  X[is.na(X)] <- 0
  D <- as.matrix(proxy::dist(X, method = metric))
  D
}

make_delta_distance <- function(dfm_object) {
  X <- as.matrix(dfm_object)
  X <- sweep(X, 1, rowSums(X), "/")
  X[is.na(X)] <- 0
  Z <- scale(X)
  Z[is.na(Z)] <- 0
  D <- matrix(0, nrow(Z), nrow(Z))
  for(i in seq_len(nrow(Z))) {
    for(j in seq_len(nrow(Z))) {
      D[i, j] <- mean(abs(Z[i, ] - Z[j, ]))
    }
  }
  D
}

nearest_neighbors <- function(doc, D, n = 5, include_self = FALSE) {
  v <- sort(D[doc, ], decreasing = FALSE)
  if(!include_self) v <- v[names(v) != doc]
  head(v, n)
}

mean_distance <- function(group1, group2, D, metadata, group_col = "section") {
  idx1 <- which(metadata[[group_col]] == group1)
  idx2 <- which(metadata[[group_col]] == group2)
  mean(D[idx1, idx2])
}

within_distance <- function(group, D, metadata, group_col = "section") {
  idx <- which(metadata[[group_col]] == group)
  subD <- D[idx, idx, drop = FALSE]
  mean(subD[upper.tri(subD)])
}

section_distance_matrix <- function(D, metadata, group_col = "section") {
  groups <- unique(metadata[[group_col]])
  M <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(groups), ncol = length(groups))
  rownames(M) <- groups
  colnames(M) <- groups
  for(i in seq_along(groups)) {
    for(j in seq_along(groups)) {
      M[i, j] <- mean_distance(groups[i], groups[j], D, metadata, group_col)
    }
  }
  round(M, 4)
}

get_doc_metadata <- function(metadata, doc_ids) {
  metadata %>%
    select(doc_id, book, chapter, section, n_verses) %>%
    filter(doc_id %in% doc_ids)
}
target_books <- c(
  "Isaiah",
  "Jeremiah", "Ezekiel", "Hosea", "Amos",
  "1 Samuel", "2 Samuel", "1 Kings", "2 Kings",
  "Psalms", "Job", "Proverbs"
)

kjv_selected <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_verses.rds"),
  quote({
    kjv_bible() %>%
      filter(book_title %in% target_books) %>%
      transmute(
        corpus_id = "KJV",
        translation = "KJV",
        book = book_title,
        chapter = as.integer(chapter_number),
        verse = as.integer(verse_number),
        text = str_squish(text)
      ) %>%
      arrange(match(book, target_books), chapter, verse)
  })
)

write_csv(kjv_selected, file.path(DATA_DIR, "kjv.csv"))
table(kjv_selected$book)

 1 Kings 1 Samuel  2 Kings 2 Samuel     Amos  Ezekiel    Hosea   Isaiah Jeremiah      Job 
     816      810      719      695      146     1273      197     1292     1364     1070 
Proverbs   Psalms 
     915     2461 
kjv_chapters <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_chapters.rds"),
  quote({
    kjv_selected %>%
      group_by(corpus_id, translation, book, chapter) %>%
      summarize(
        text = str_c(text, collapse = " "),
        n_verses = n(),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        doc_id = paste(book, chapter, sep = "_"),
        section = case_when(
          book == "Isaiah" & chapter <= 35 ~ "Isaiah_1_35",
          book == "Isaiah" & chapter <= 39 ~ "Isaiah_36_39",
          book == "Isaiah" & chapter <= 55 ~ "Isaiah_40_55",
          book == "Isaiah" & chapter <= 66 ~ "Isaiah_56_66",
          TRUE ~ book
        ),
        macro_genre = case_when(
          book %in% c("1 Samuel", "2 Samuel", "1 Kings", "2 Kings") ~ "Narrative",
          book %in% c("Psalms", "Job", "Proverbs") ~ "Poetic/Wisdom",
          TRUE ~ "Prophetic"
        )
      ) %>%
      select(corpus_id, doc_id, book, chapter, section, macro_genre, n_verses, text)
  })
)

write_csv(kjv_chapters, file.path(DATA_DIR, "kjv_chapters.csv"))
table(kjv_chapters$section)

     1 Kings     1 Samuel      2 Kings     2 Samuel         Amos      Ezekiel        Hosea 
          22           31           25           24            9           48           14 
 Isaiah_1_35 Isaiah_36_39 Isaiah_40_55 Isaiah_56_66     Jeremiah          Job     Proverbs 
          35            4           16           11           52           42           31 
      Psalms 
         150 
corp <- corpus(kjv_chapters, text_field = "text")

docvars(corp, "corpus_id") <- kjv_chapters$corpus_id
docvars(corp, "doc_id") <- kjv_chapters$doc_id
docvars(corp, "book") <- kjv_chapters$book
docvars(corp, "chapter") <- kjv_chapters$chapter
docvars(corp, "section") <- kjv_chapters$section
docvars(corp, "macro_genre") <- kjv_chapters$macro_genre

summary(corp, 5)
Corpus consisting of 514 documents, showing 5 documents:

      Text Types Tokens Sentences corpus_id    book chapter section macro_genre n_verses

 1 Kings_2   391   1750        57       KJV 1 Kings       2 1 Kings   Narrative       46
 1 Kings_3   275    986        32       KJV 1 Kings       3 1 Kings   Narrative       28
 1 Kings_4   271    820        19       KJV 1 Kings       4 1 Kings   Narrative       34

    doc_id

 1 Kings_5
build_dfm_char_ngram <- function(corp, n = 3, min_docfreq = 5) {
  chars <- tokens(
    corp,
    what = "character",
    remove_punct = TRUE,
    remove_numbers = TRUE
  )
  tokens_ngrams(chars, n = n, concatenator = "") %>%
    dfm() %>%
    dfm_trim(min_docfreq = min_docfreq)
}

build_dfm_word_ngram <- function(corp, n = 3, min_docfreq = 5) {
  toks <- tokens(
    corp,
    remove_punct = TRUE,
    remove_numbers = TRUE
  ) %>%
    tokens_tolower()
  tokens_ngrams(toks, n = n, concatenator = "_") %>%
    dfm() %>%
    dfm_trim(min_docfreq = min_docfreq)
}

build_dfm_function_words <- function(corp, min_docfreq = 5) {
  function_words <- c(
    stopwords::stopwords("en"),
    "unto", "ye", "thou", "thee", "thy", "thine",
    "hath", "doth", "shall", "shalt", "wilt", "art"
  ) %>% unique()

  toks <- tokens(
    corp,
    remove_punct = TRUE,
    remove_numbers = TRUE
  ) %>%
    tokens_tolower() %>%
    tokens_select(pattern = function_words, selection = "keep")

  dfm(toks) %>%
    dfm_trim(min_docfreq = min_docfreq)
}

build_pos_df <- function(chapters, rebuild = FALSE) {
  model_path <- file.path(CACHE_DIR, "english-ewt-ud-2.5-191206.udpipe")

  if(!file.exists(model_path)) {
    model_file <- udpipe_download_model(language = "english-ewt", model_dir = CACHE_DIR)
    model_path <- model_file$file_model
  }

  ud_model <- udpipe_load_model(model_path)

  cache_rds(
    file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_pos_df.rds"),
    quote({
      pos_annot <- udpipe_annotate(
        ud_model,
        x = chapters$text,
        doc_id = chapters$doc_id
      )
      as.data.frame(pos_annot)
    }),
    rebuild = rebuild
  )
}

build_dfm_pos_ngram <- function(pos_df, n = 3, min_docfreq = 5) {
  pos_docs <- pos_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(upos)) %>%
    group_by(doc_id) %>%
    summarize(
      pos_text = str_c(upos, collapse = " "),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  pos_corp <- corpus(pos_docs, text_field = "pos_text")
  toks_pos <- tokens(pos_corp, what = "word")

  tokens_ngrams(toks_pos, n = n, concatenator = "_") %>%
    dfm() %>%
    dfm_trim(min_docfreq = min_docfreq)
}
# Toggle this if you want to force re-tagging POS. It can take time.
REBUILD_POS <- FALSE

feature_specs <- tibble(
  corpus_id = "KJV",
  feature_set = c("char3", "char4", "word3", "function_words", "pos3"),
  description = c(
    "Character 3-grams",
    "Character 4-grams",
    "Word 3-grams",
    "Function words",
    "Universal Dependencies POS 3-grams"
  )
)

# Character 3-grams
dfm_char3 <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_dfm_char3.rds"),
  quote(build_dfm_char_ngram(corp, n = 3, min_docfreq = 5))
)

# Character 4-grams
dfm_char4 <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_dfm_char4.rds"),
  quote(build_dfm_char_ngram(corp, n = 4, min_docfreq = 5))
)

# Word 3-grams
dfm_word3 <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_dfm_word3.rds"),
  quote(build_dfm_word_ngram(corp, n = 3, min_docfreq = 5))
)

# Function words
dfm_function_words <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_dfm_function_words.rds"),
  quote(build_dfm_function_words(corp, min_docfreq = 5))
)

# POS 3-grams
pos_df <- build_pos_df(kjv_chapters, rebuild = REBUILD_POS)
trying URL 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jwijffels/udpipe.models.ud.2.5/master/inst/udpipe-ud-2.5-191206/english-ewt-ud-2.5-191206.udpipe'
Content type 'application/octet-stream' length 16309608 bytes (15.6 MB)
downloaded 15.6 MB
dfm_pos3 <- cache_rds(
  file.path(CACHE_DIR, "KJV_dfm_pos3.rds"),
  quote(build_dfm_pos_ngram(pos_df, n = 3, min_docfreq = 5))
)

feature_objects <- list(
  char3 = dfm_char3,
  char4 = dfm_char4,
  word3 = dfm_word3,
  function_words = dfm_function_words,
  pos3 = dfm_pos3
)

feature_summary <- imap_dfr(feature_objects, function(x, nm) {
  tibble(
    corpus_id = "KJV",
    feature_set = nm,
    n_docs = ndoc(x),
    n_features = nfeat(x),
    top_features = paste(names(topfeatures(x, 10)), collapse = ", ")
  )
})

feature_summary
write_csv(feature_summary, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_feature_summary.csv"))
# Distance metrics implemented for all features.
# cosine = cosine distance; similarity = 1 - distance.
# delta = Burrows-style Delta implemented above.

metrics <- c("cosine", "delta")

build_distance_cached <- function(corpus_id, feature_set, dfm_object, metric) {
  path <- file.path(CACHE_DIR, paste0(corpus_id, "_D_", feature_set, "_", metric, ".rds"))

  D <- cache_rds(
    path,
    quote({
      if(metric == "delta") {
        make_delta_distance(dfm_object)
      } else {
        make_distance(dfm_object, metric = metric)
      }
    })
  )

  rownames(D) <- kjv_chapters$doc_id
  colnames(D) <- kjv_chapters$doc_id
  D
}

distance_objects <- list()

for(feature_set in names(feature_objects)) {
  for(metric in metrics) {
    key <- paste("KJV", feature_set, metric, sep = "__")
    distance_objects[[key]] <- build_distance_cached(
      corpus_id = "KJV",
      feature_set = feature_set,
      dfm_object = feature_objects[[feature_set]],
      metric = metric
    )
  }
}

names(distance_objects)
 [1] "KJV__char3__cosine"          "KJV__char3__delta"          
 [3] "KJV__char4__cosine"          "KJV__char4__delta"          
 [5] "KJV__word3__cosine"          "KJV__word3__delta"          
 [7] "KJV__function_words__cosine" "KJV__function_words__delta" 
 [9] "KJV__pos3__cosine"           "KJV__pos3__delta"           
comparison_pairs <- tribble(
  ~comparison, ~group1, ~group2,
  "Isaiah_1_35 vs Isaiah_40_55", "Isaiah_1_35", "Isaiah_40_55",
  "Isaiah_40_55 vs Isaiah_56_66", "Isaiah_40_55", "Isaiah_56_66",
  "Isaiah_40_55 vs Jeremiah", "Isaiah_40_55", "Jeremiah",
  "Isaiah_40_55 vs Ezekiel", "Isaiah_40_55", "Ezekiel",
  "Isaiah_1_35 vs Jeremiah", "Isaiah_1_35", "Jeremiah",
  "Isaiah_36_39 vs 2 Kings", "Isaiah_36_39", "2 Kings"
)

results_table <- imap_dfr(distance_objects, function(D, key) {
  parts <- str_split(key, "__", simplify = TRUE)
  corpus_id <- parts[1]
  feature_set <- parts[2]
  metric <- parts[3]

  comparison_pairs %>%
    mutate(
      corpus_id = corpus_id,
      feature_set = feature_set,
      metric = metric,
      distance = map2_dbl(group1, group2, ~mean_distance(.x, .y, D, kjv_chapters))
    ) %>%
    select(corpus_id, feature_set, metric, comparison, group1, group2, distance)
})

results_table %>% arrange(comparison, distance)
write_csv(results_table, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_group_distance_results.csv"))
within_results <- imap_dfr(distance_objects, function(D, key) {
  parts <- str_split(key, "__", simplify = TRUE)
  corpus_id <- parts[1]
  feature_set <- parts[2]
  metric <- parts[3]

  tibble(section = unique(kjv_chapters$section)) %>%
    mutate(
      corpus_id = corpus_id,
      feature_set = feature_set,
      metric = metric,
      within_distance = map_dbl(section, ~within_distance(.x, D, kjv_chapters))
    ) %>%
    select(corpus_id, feature_set, metric, section, within_distance)
})

within_results %>% arrange(feature_set, metric, within_distance)
write_csv(within_results, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_within_group_cohesion.csv"))
# Top-k neighbors for all Isaiah chapters, across all feature sets and metrics.
TOP_K <- 5

target_docs <- kjv_chapters %>%
  filter(book == "Isaiah") %>%
  pull(doc_id)

neighbors_table <- imap_dfr(distance_objects, function(D, key) {
  parts <- str_split(key, "__", simplify = TRUE)
  corpus_id <- parts[1]
  feature_set <- parts[2]
  metric <- parts[3]

  map_dfr(target_docs, function(doc) {
    nn <- nearest_neighbors(doc, D, n = TOP_K, include_self = FALSE)

    tibble(
      corpus_id = corpus_id,
      feature_set = feature_set,
      metric = metric,
      doc_id = doc,
      neighbor_rank = seq_along(nn),
      neighbor_doc_id = names(nn),
      distance = as.numeric(nn),
      similarity = if_else(metric == "cosine", 1 - distance, 1 / (1 + distance))
    )
  })
}) %>%
  left_join(
    kjv_chapters %>%
      select(doc_id, doc_book = book, doc_chapter = chapter, doc_section = section),
    by = "doc_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    kjv_chapters %>%
      select(neighbor_doc_id = doc_id, neighbor_book = book, neighbor_chapter = chapter, neighbor_section = section),
    by = "neighbor_doc_id"
  )

neighbors_table %>%
  filter(doc_id == "Isaiah_40") %>%
  arrange(feature_set, metric, neighbor_rank)

write_csv(neighbors_table, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_top5_neighbors.csv"))
# Two voting strategies are computed:
# 1. Count voting: every top-5 neighbor gets one vote.
# 2. Similarity-sum voting: closer neighbors get more weight.
#
# Recommendation for interpretation:
# - Use count voting as the robust, easy-to-explain baseline.
# - Use similarity-sum as a sensitivity analysis.
# - If both agree, the ensemble conclusion is stronger.

ensemble_votes_by_doc <- neighbors_table %>%
  group_by(doc_id, doc_book, doc_chapter, doc_section, neighbor_section) %>%
  summarize(
    vote_count = n(),
    similarity_sum = sum(similarity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rank = mean(neighbor_rank),
    mean_distance = mean(distance),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(doc_id) %>%
  mutate(
    count_rank = rank(-vote_count, ties.method = "min"),
    similarity_rank = rank(-similarity_sum, ties.method = "min")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(doc_id, count_rank, similarity_rank)

ensemble_votes_by_doc %>%
  filter(doc_id %in% c("Isaiah_35", "Isaiah_36", "Isaiah_40", "Isaiah_55", "Isaiah_56"))

write_csv(ensemble_votes_by_doc, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_ensemble_votes_by_doc.csv"))
ensemble_winners_count <- ensemble_votes_by_doc %>%
  group_by(doc_id) %>%
  slice_max(vote_count, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(winner_method = "top5_count")

ensemble_winners_similarity <- ensemble_votes_by_doc %>%
  group_by(doc_id) %>%
  slice_max(similarity_sum, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(winner_method = "similarity_sum")

ensemble_winners <- bind_rows(
  ensemble_winners_count,
  ensemble_winners_similarity
) %>%
  arrange(doc_id, winner_method)

ensemble_winners %>%
  filter(doc_id %in% c("Isaiah_35", "Isaiah_36", "Isaiah_40", "Isaiah_55", "Isaiah_56"))

write_csv(ensemble_winners, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_ensemble_winners.csv"))
section_ensemble_summary <- ensemble_votes_by_doc %>%
  group_by(doc_section, neighbor_section) %>%
  summarize(
    total_votes = sum(vote_count),
    total_similarity = sum(similarity_sum),
    n_target_docs = n_distinct(doc_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(doc_section) %>%
  mutate(
    vote_share = total_votes / sum(total_votes),
    similarity_share = total_similarity / sum(total_similarity)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(doc_section, desc(vote_share))

section_ensemble_summary
write_csv(section_ensemble_summary, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "KJV_section_ensemble_summary.csv"))
neighbors_table %>%
  filter(doc_id == "Isaiah_40") %>%
  arrange(feature_set, metric, neighbor_rank) %>%
  select(feature_set, metric, neighbor_rank, neighbor_doc_id, neighbor_section, distance, similarity)

ensemble_votes_by_doc %>%
  filter(doc_id == "Isaiah_40") %>%
  arrange(count_rank, similarity_rank)
# PCA is included for visualization only. The ensemble/distance tables above are the primary evidence.
X_char3 <- as.matrix(dfm_weight(dfm_char3, scheme = "prop"))
pca_char3 <- prcomp(X_char3, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

var_explained <- pca_char3$sdev^2 / sum(pca_char3$sdev^2)
pc1_pct <- round(100 * var_explained[1], 1)
pc2_pct <- round(100 * var_explained[2], 1)

pca_df <- as_tibble(pca_char3$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  mutate(
    doc_id = kjv_chapters$doc_id,
    book = kjv_chapters$book,
    chapter = kjv_chapters$chapter,
    section = kjv_chapters$section,
    macro_genre = kjv_chapters$macro_genre
  )

ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = section)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "KJV Stylometry: Character 3-gram PCA",
    subtitle = "Visualization only; distance/ensemble tables use full feature space",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_pct, "% variance explained)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_pct, "% variance explained)")
  )

isaiah_pca <- pca_df %>%
  filter(book == "Isaiah")

ggplot(isaiah_pca, aes(PC1, PC2, color = section)) +
  geom_path(aes(group = 1), color = "gray70", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = chapter), size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE, vjust = -0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Isaiah Only: Character 3-gram PCA",
    subtitle = "Chapters connected sequentially",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1_pct, "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2_pct, "%)")
  )

# Files created by this notebook:
list.files(DATA_DIR, full.names = TRUE)
[1] "data/char3_comparisons.csv"  "data/feature_comparison.csv"
[3] "data/kjv.csv"                "data/kjv_chapters.csv"      
[5] "data/kjv_raw.json"           "data/pca_char3.csv"         
list.files(RESULTS_DIR, full.names = TRUE)
[1] "results/KJV_ensemble_votes_by_doc.csv"    "results/KJV_ensemble_winners.csv"        
[3] "results/KJV_feature_summary.csv"          "results/KJV_group_distance_results.csv"  
[5] "results/KJV_section_ensemble_summary.csv" "results/KJV_top5_neighbors.csv"          
[7] "results/KJV_within_group_cohesion.csv"   

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE)

get_neighbors <- function(D, object_name, k = 5) {
  
  parts <- str_split(object_name, "__", simplify = TRUE)
  
  corpus_id <- parts[1]
  feature_set <- parts[2]
  metric <- parts[3]
  
  docs <- rownames(D)
  
  bind_rows(
    lapply(
      docs,
      function(doc) {
        
        sorted_distances <- sort(D[doc, ])
        
        tibble(
          neighbor_doc_id = names(sorted_distances),
          distance = as.numeric(sorted_distances)
        ) %>%
          filter(neighbor_doc_id != doc) %>%
          slice(1:k) %>%
          mutate(
            corpus_id = corpus_id,
            feature_set = feature_set,
            metric = metric,
            doc_id = doc,
            neighbor_rank = row_number(),
            similarity = 1 - distance
          )
      }
    )
  )
}

ensemble_neighbors <- bind_rows(
  lapply(
    names(distance_objects),
    function(object_name) {
      get_neighbors(
        D = distance_objects[[object_name]],
        object_name = object_name,
        k = 5
      )
    }
  )
)

ensemble_neighbors <- ensemble_neighbors %>%
  left_join(
    kjv_chapters %>%
      select(doc_id, doc_section = section),
    by = "doc_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    kjv_chapters %>%
      select(neighbor_doc_id = doc_id, neighbor_section = section),
    by = "neighbor_doc_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    rank_weight = 6 - neighbor_rank,
    weighted_similarity = similarity * rank_weight
  )

write_csv(
  ensemble_neighbors,
  "results/KJV_ensemble_neighbors_weighted.csv"
)

weighted_section_votes <- ensemble_neighbors %>%
  group_by(
    corpus_id,
    doc_id,
    doc_section,
    neighbor_section
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    top5_count = n(),
    rank_weight_sum = sum(rank_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    similarity_sum = sum(similarity, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_similarity_sum = sum(weighted_similarity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_distance = mean(distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    feature_sets = str_c(sort(unique(feature_set)), collapse = ";"),
    metrics = str_c(sort(unique(metric)), collapse = ";"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write_csv(
  weighted_section_votes,
  "results/KJV_weighted_section_votes.csv"
)

overall_ensemble_ranked <- weighted_section_votes %>%
  group_by(corpus_id, doc_id, doc_section) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(weighted_similarity_sum),
    desc(similarity_sum),
    desc(top5_count),
    mean_distance,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ensemble_rank = row_number(),
    max_score = max(weighted_similarity_sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    margin_from_winner = max_score - weighted_similarity_sum
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

overall_ensemble_winner <- overall_ensemble_ranked %>%
  filter(ensemble_rank == 1) %>%
  rename(
    winning_section = neighbor_section
  )

write_csv(
  overall_ensemble_ranked,
  "results/KJV_overall_ensemble_ranked.csv"
)

write_csv(
  overall_ensemble_winner,
  "results/KJV_overall_ensemble_winner.csv"
)

overall_ensemble_winner

feature_votes <- ensemble_neighbors %>%
  group_by(
    corpus_id,
    doc_id,
    feature_set,
    neighbor_section
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    top5_count = n(),
    similarity_sum = sum(similarity),
    weighted_similarity_sum = sum(weighted_similarity),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

feature_winners <- feature_votes %>%
  group_by(
    corpus_id,
    doc_id,
    feature_set
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(weighted_similarity_sum),
    desc(similarity_sum),
    desc(top5_count),
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

head(feature_winners)

write_csv(

feature_winners,

"results/KJV_feature_winners.csv"

)

feature_winners



feature_agreement <- feature_winners %>%
  group_by(
    corpus_id,
    doc_id,
    neighbor_section
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    agreement = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(feature_agreement)


write_csv(

feature_agreement,

"results/KJV_feature_agreement.csv"

)



overall_ensemble <- feature_agreement %>%
  group_by(
    corpus_id,
    doc_id
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(agreement),
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ensemble_rank = row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

overall_ensemble_winner <- overall_ensemble %>%
  filter(
    ensemble_rank == 1
  )

head(overall_ensemble_winner)

write_csv(

overall_ensemble_winner,

"results/KJV_overall_ensemble_winner.csv"

)



Isaiah_wide <- feature_winners %>%
  filter(
    grepl("^Isaiah_", doc_id)
  ) %>%
  select(
    doc_id,
    feature_set,
    winner = neighbor_section
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = feature_set,
    values_from = winner
  )

Isaiah_wide <- Isaiah_wide %>%
  left_join(
    overall_ensemble_winner %>%
      select(
        doc_id,
        overall = neighbor_section,
        agreement
      ),
    by = "doc_id"
  )

Isaiah_wide


write_csv(

Isaiah_wide,

"results/KJV_Isaiah_feature_agreement_wide.csv"

)


feature_agreement <-

feature_winners %>%

group_by(

  corpus_id,

  doc_id,

  neighbor_section

)

%>%

summarize(

  agreement=

    n(),

  feature_sets=

    str_c(

      sort(
        feature_set
      ),

      collapse=";"

    ),

  .groups="drop"

)

write_csv(

feature_agreement,

"results/KJV_feature_agreement.csv"

)

feature_agreement
